3410       * {@link ObjectSwap#forMediaTypes()} or {@link Swap#mediaTypes() @Swap(mediaTypes)} are used to come up with the best match.
3411       *
3412       * <p>
3413       * Values can consist of any of the following types:
3414       * <ul>
3415       *    <li>Any subclass of {@link ObjectSwap}.
3416       *    <li>Any instance of {@link ObjectSwap}.
3417       *    <li>Any surrogate class.  A shortcut for defining a {@link SurrogateSwap}.
3418       *    <li>Any array or collection of the objects above.
3419       * </ul>
3420       *
3421       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
3422       * <p class='bjava'>
3423       *    <jc>// Sample swap for converting Dates to ISO8601 strings.</jc>
3424       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyDateSwap <jk>extends</jk> StringSwap&lt;Date&gt; {
3425       *       <jc>// ISO8601 formatter.</jc>
3426       *       <jk>private</jk> DateFormat <jf>format</jf> = <jk>new</jk> SimpleDateFormat(<js>"yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssZ"</js>);
3427       *
3428       *       <ja>@Override</ja>
3429       *       <jk>public</jk> String swap(MarshallingSession <jv>session</jv>, Date <jv>date</jv>) {
3430       *          <jk>return</jk> <jf>format</jf>.format(<jv>date</jv>);
3431       *       }
3432       *
3433       *       <ja>@Override</ja>
3434       *       <jk>public</jk> Date unswap(MarshallingSession <jv>session</jv>, String <jv>string</jv>, ClassMeta <jv>hint</jv>) <jk>throws</jk> Exception {
3435       *          <jk>return</jk> <jf>format</jf>.parse(<jv>string</jv>);
3436       *       }
3437       *    }
3438       *
3439       *    <jc>// Sample bean with a Date field.</jc>
3440       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
3441       *       <jk>public</jk> Date <jf>date</jf> = <jk>new</jk> Date(112, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6);
3442       *    }
3443       *
3444       *    <jc>// Create a serializer that uses our date swap.</jc>
3445       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
3446       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
3447       *       .swaps(MyDateSwap.<jk>class</jk>)
3448       *       .build();
3449       *
3450       *    <jc>// Produces:  {"date":"2012-03-03T04:05:06-0500"}</jc>
3451       *    String <jv>json</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
3452       *
3453       *    <jc>// Create a serializer that uses our date swap.</jc>
3454       *    ReaderParser <jv>parser</jv> = JsonParser
3455       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
3456       *       .swaps(MyDateSwap.<jk>class</jk>)
3457       *       .build();
3458       *
3459       *    <jc>// Use our parser to parse a bean.</jc>
3460       *    MyBean <jv>bean</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>json</jv>, MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);
3461       * </p>
3462       *
3463       * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
3464       *    <li class='note'>The {@link Swap @Swap} annotation can also be used on classes to identify swaps for the class.
3465       *    <li class='note'>The {@link Swap @Swap} annotation can also be used on bean methods and fields to identify swaps for values of those bean properties.
3466       * </ul>
3467       *
3468       * @param values
3469       *    The values to add to this setting.
3470       *    <br>Values can consist of any of the following types:
3471       *    <ul>
3472       *       <li>Any subclass of {@link ObjectSwap}.
3473       *       <li>Any surrogate class.  A shortcut for defining a {@link SurrogateSwap}.
3474       *       <li>Any array/collection/stream of the objects above.
3475       *    </ul>
3476       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
3477       * @return This object.
3478       */
3479      public Builder swaps(Object...values) {
3480         assertArgNoNulls(ARG_values, values);
3481         swaps().addAll(0, accumulate(values));
3482         return this;
3483      }
3484
3485      /**
3486       * <i><l>Context</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  TimeZone.
3487       *
3488       * <p>
3489       * Specifies the default time zone for serializer and parser sessions when not specified via {@link MarshallingSession.Builder#timeZone(TimeZone)}.
3490       * Typically used for POJO swaps that need to deal with timezones such as swaps that convert <l>Date</l> and <l>Calendar</l>
3491       * objects to strings by accessing it via the session passed into the {@link ObjectSwap#swap(MarshallingSession, Object)} and
3492       * {@link ObjectSwap#unswap(MarshallingSession, Object, ClassMeta, String)} methods.
3493       *
3494       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
3495       * <p class='bjava'>
3496       *    <jc>// Define a POJO swap that skips serializing beans if the time zone is GMT.</jc>
3497       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBeanSwap <jk>extends</jk> StringSwap&lt;MyBean&gt; {
3498       *       <ja>@Override</ja>
3499       *       <jk>public</jk> String swap(MarshallingSession <jv>session</jv>, MyBean <jv>bean</jv>) <jk>throws</jk> Exception {
3500       *          <jk>if</jk> (<jv>session</jv>.getTimeZone().equals(TimeZone.<jsf>GMT</jsf>))
3501       *             <jk>return null</jk>;
3502       *          <jk>return</jk> <jv>bean</jv>.toString();
3503       *       }
3504       *    }
3505       *
3506       *    <jc>// Create a serializer that uses GMT if the timezone is not specified in the session args.</jc>
3507       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
3508       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
3509       *       .timeZone(TimeZone.<jsf>GMT</jsf>)
3510       *       .build();
3511       * </p>
3512       *
3513       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
3514       *    <li class='ja'>{@link MarshalledConfig#timeZone()}
3515       *    <li class='jm'>{@link MarshallingSession.Builder#timeZone(TimeZone)}
3516       * </ul>
3517       *
3518       * @param value The new value for this property.
3519       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (timezone will not be set, defaults to system timezone).
3520       * @return This object.
3521       */
3522      public Builder timeZone(TimeZone value) {
3523         timeZone = value;
3524         return this;
3525      }
3526
3527      /**
3528       * Duration wire format.
3529       *
3530       * @param value The value for this setting.
3531       * @return This object.
3532       */
3533      public Builder durationFormat(DurationFormat value) {
3534         durationFormat = value == null ? DurationFormat.ISO_8601_WITH_DAYS : value;
3535         return this;
3536      }
3537
3538      /**
3539       * Period wire format.
3540       *
3541       * @param value The value for this setting.
3542       * @return This object.
3543       */
3544      public Builder periodFormat(PeriodFormat value) {
3545         periodFormat = value == null ? PeriodFormat.ISO_8601 : value;
3546         return this;
3547      }
3548
3549      /**
3550       * Calendar wire format.
3551       *
3552       * @param value The value for this setting.
3553       * @return This object.
3554       */
3555      public Builder calendarFormat(CalendarFormat value) {
3556         calendarFormat = value == null ? CalendarFormat.ISO_OFFSET_DATE_TIME : value;
3557         return this;
3558      }
3559
3560      /**
3561       * Date wire format.
3562       *
3563       * @param value The value for this setting.
3564       * @return This object.
3565       */
3566      public Builder dateFormat(DateFormat value) {
3567         dateFormat = value == null ? DateFormat.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME : value;
3568         return this;
3569      }
3570
3571      /**
3572       * Temporal wire format.
3573       *
3574       * @param value The value for this setting.
3575       * @return This object.
3576       */
3577      public Builder temporalFormat(TemporalFormat value) {
3578         temporalFormat = value == null ? TemporalFormat.DEFAULT : value;
3579         return this;
3580      }
3581
3582      /**
3583       * Time-zone wire format.
3584       *
3585       * @param value The value for this setting.
3586       * @return This object.
3587       */
3588      public Builder timeZoneFormat(TimeZoneFormat value) {
3589         timeZoneFormat = value == null ? TimeZoneFormat.ID : value;
3590         return this;
3591      }
3592
3593      /**
3594       * Locale wire format.
3595       *
3596       * @param value The value for this setting.
3597       * @return This object.
3598       */
3599      public Builder localeFormat(LocaleFormat value) {
3600         localeFormat = value == null ? LocaleFormat.BCP_47 : value;
3601         return this;
3602      }
3603
3604      /**
3605       * Binary wire format.
3606       *
3607       * <p>
3608       * Controls how <code><jk>byte</jk>[]</code> values are written to and read from text-based
3609       * serializer / parser wire formats, and the encoding used by stream-based serializers when
3610       * converting their byte output to a string.
3611       *
3612       * @param value The value for this setting.
3613       * @return This object.
3614       */
3615      public Builder binaryFormat(BinaryFormat value) {
3616         binaryFormat = value == null ? BinaryFormat.NOT_SET : value;
3617         return this;
3618      }
3619
3620      /**
3621       * Enum wire format.
3622       *
3623       * @param value The value for this setting.
3624       * @return This object.
3625       */
3626      public Builder enumFormat(EnumFormat value) {
3627         enumFormat = value == null ? EnumFormat.TO_STRING : value;
3628         return this;
3629      }
3630
3631      /**
3632       * UUID wire format.
3633       *
3634       * <p>
3635       * Controls how {@link UUID} values are written to text-based wire formats. Binary
3636       * serializers (BSON / CBOR / MsgPack / Prototext) emit native 16-byte binary regardless of this setting.
3637       *
3638       * @param value The value for this setting.
3639       * @return This object.
3640       */
3641      public Builder uuidFormat(UuidFormat value) {
3642         uuidFormat = value == null ? UuidFormat.STANDARD : value;
3643         return this;
3644      }
3645
3646      /**
3647       * BitSet wire format.
3648       *
3649       * <p>
3650       * Controls how {@link BitSet} values are written to text-based wire formats.
3651       *
3652       * @param value The value for this setting.
3653       * @return This object.
3654       */
3655      public Builder bitSetFormat(BitSetFormat value) {
3656         bitSetFormat = value == null ? BitSetFormat.INDICES : value;
3657         return this;
3658      }
3659
3660      /**
3661       * Big-number wire format.
3662       *
3663       * <p>
3664       * Controls how {@link BigInteger} and {@link BigDecimal} values are written to
3665       * text-based wire formats. Useful for safe JS interop where values outside
3666       * {@code ±(2^53 − 1)} would silently lose precision.
3667       *
3668       * @param value The value for this setting.
3669       * @return This object.
3670       */
3671      public Builder bigNumberFormat(BigNumberFormat value) {
3672         bigNumberFormat = value == null ? BigNumberFormat.NUMBER : value;
3673         return this;
3674      }
3675
3676      /**
3677       * Boolean wire format.
3678       *
3679       * <p>
3680       * Controls how {@link Boolean} / <code><jk>boolean</jk></code> values are written to text-based
3681       * wire formats. Binary serializers (BSON / CBOR / MsgPack / Prototext / Parquet) emit a native
3682       * boolean wire type regardless of this setting.
3683       *
3684       * @param value The value for this setting.
3685       * @return This object.
3686       */
3687      public Builder booleanFormat(BooleanFormat value) {
3688         booleanFormat = value == null ? BooleanFormat.TRUE_FALSE : value;
3689         return this;
3690      }
3691
3692      /**
3693       * Float / Double non-finite wire format.
3694       *
3695       * <p>
3696       * Controls how non-finite {@link Float} / {@link Double} values ({@code NaN} / {@code ±Infinity})
3697       * are written to text-based wire formats. The default {@link FloatFormat#NaN_AS_NULL} is
3698       * JSON-spec-compliant. Binary serializers emit native IEEE-754 floats regardless of this setting.
3699       *
3700       * @param value The value for this setting.
3701       * @return This object.
3702       */
3703      public Builder floatFormat(FloatFormat value) {
3704         floatFormat = value == null ? FloatFormat.NaN_AS_NULL : value;
3705         return this;
3706      }
3707
3708      /**
3709       * Currency wire format.
3710       *
3711       * <p>
3712       * Controls how {@link Currency} values are written to text-based wire formats. The
3713       * default {@link CurrencyFormat#ISO_CODE} is the only setting safe for machine-to-machine wires;
3714       * {@link CurrencyFormat#SYMBOL} and {@link CurrencyFormat#DISPLAY_NAME} are locale-sensitive and
3715       * best-effort on the parse side.
3716       *
3717       * @param value The value for this setting.
3718       * @return This object.
3719       */
3720      public Builder currencyFormat(CurrencyFormat value) {
3721         currencyFormat = value == null ? CurrencyFormat.ISO_CODE : value;
3722         return this;
3723      }
3724
3725      /**
3726       * Class wire format.
3727       *
3728       * <p>
3729       * Controls how {@link Class} values are written to text-based wire formats. The default
3730       * {@link ClassFormat#FQCN} matches the historical {@code ClassSwap} behavior.
3731       * {@link ClassFormat#SIMPLE_NAME} is serialize-only — the parser path throws
3732       * {@link UnsupportedOperationException}.
3733       *
3734       * @param value The value for this setting.
3735       * @return This object.
3736       */
3737      public Builder classFormat(ClassFormat value) {
3738         classFormat = value == null ? ClassFormat.FQCN : value;
3739         return this;
3740      }
3741
3742      /**
3743       * Session classloader.
3744       *
3745       * <p>
3746       * Sets the classloader used when parsing wire-format class names (e.g. FQCN or binary-name strings
3747       * written by {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps.ClassFormatSwap}).  When <jk>null</jk>, the thread-context classloader is
3748       * used as a fallback — which is the historical behavior.
3749       *
3750       * <p>
3751       * Useful in OSGi bundles, webapp classloaders, and plugin systems where the thread-context
3752       * classloader does not have visibility into the classes that the session needs to resolve.
3753       *
3754       * @param value The classloader to use for class resolution. Can be <jk>null</jk> to reset to thread-context fallback.
3755       * @return This object.
3756       */
3757      public Builder classLoader(ClassLoader value) {
3758         classLoader = value;
3759         return this;
3760      }
3761
3762      @Override /* Overridden from Builder */
3763      public Builder type(Class<? extends Context> value) {
3764         assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
3765         super.type(value);
3766         return this;
3767      }
3768
3769      /**
3770       * An identifying name for this class.
3771       *
3772       * <p>
3773       * The name is used to identify the class type during parsing when it cannot be inferred through reflection.
3774       * For example, if a bean property is of type <c>Object</c>, then the serializer will add the name to the
3775       * output so that the class can be determined during parsing.
3776       *
3777       * <p>
3778       * It is also used to specify element names in XML.
3779       *
3780       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
3781       * <p class='bjava'>
3782       *    <jc>// Use _type='mybean' to identify this bean.</jc>
3783       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {...}
3784       *
3785       *    <jc>// Create a serializer and specify the type name..</jc>
3786       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
3787       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
3788       *       .typeName(MyBean.<jk>class</jk>, <js>"mybean"</js>)
3789       *       .build();
3790       *
3791       *    <jc>// Produces:  {"_type":"mybean",...}</jc>
3792       *    String <jv>json</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
3793       * </p>
3794       *
3795       * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
3796       *    <li class='note'>Equivalent to the {@link Marshalled#typeName() @Marshalled(typeName)} annotation.
3797       * </ul>
3798       *
3799       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
3800       *    <li class='jc'>{@link Marshalled#typeName() @Marshalled(typeName)}
3801       *    <li class='jm'>{@link #beanDictionary(Class...)}
3802       * </ul>
3803       *
3804       * @param on
3805       *    The class the type name is being defined on.
3806       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
3807       * @param value
3808       *    The new value for this setting.
3809       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
3810       * @return This object.
3811       */
3812      public Builder typeName(Class<?> on, String value) {
3813         assertArgNotNull(ARG_on, on);
3814         assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
3815         return annotations(MarshalledApplyAnnotation.create(on).value(MarshalledAnnotation.create().typeName(value).build()).build());
3816      }
3817
3818      /**
3819       * Bean type property name.
3820       *
3821       * <p>
3822       * Same as {@link #typePropertyName(String)} except targets a specific bean class instead of globally.
3823       *
3824       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
3825       * <p class='bjava'>
3826       *    <jc>// POJOs with @Marshalled(name) annotations.</jc>
3827       *    <ja>@Marshalled</ja>(typeName=<js>"foo"</js>)
3828       *    <jk>public class</jk> Foo {...}
3829       *    <ja>@Marshalled</ja>(typeName=<js>"bar"</js>)
3830       *    <jk>public class</jk> Bar {...}
3831       *
3832       *    <jc>// A bean with a field with an indeterminate type.</jc>
3833       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
3834       *       <jk>public</jk> Object <jf>mySimpleField</jf>;
3835       *    }
3836       *
3837       *    <jc>// Create a serializer that uses 't' instead of '_type' for dictionary names.</jc>
3838       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
3839       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
3840       *       .typePropertyName(MyBean.<jk>class</jk>, <js>"t"</js>)
3841       *       .dictionary(Foo.<jk>class</jk>, Bar.<jk>class</jk>)
3842       *       .build();
3843       *
3844       *    <jc>// Produces "{mySimpleField:{t:'foo',...}}".</jc>
3845       *    String <jv>json</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
3846       * </p>
3847       *
3848       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
3849       *    <li class='ja'>{@link Marshalled#typePropertyName() @Marshalled(typePropertyName)}
3850       * </ul>
3851       *
3852       * @param on The class the type property name applies to.
3853       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
3854       * @param value
3855       *    The new value for this setting.
3856       *    <br>The default is <js>"_type"</js>.
3857       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
3858       * @return This object.
3859       */
3860      public Builder typePropertyName(Class<?> on, String value) {
3861         assertArgNotNull(ARG_on, on);
3862         assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
3863         return annotations(MarshalledApplyAnnotation.create(on).value(MarshalledAnnotation.create().typePropertyName(value).build()).build());
3864      }
3865
3866      /**
3867       * Bean type property name.
3868       *
3869       * <p>
3870       * This specifies the name of the bean property used to store the dictionary name of a bean type so that the
3871       * parser knows the data type to reconstruct.
3872       *
3873       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
3874       * <p class='bjava'>
3875       *    <jc>// POJOs with @Marshalled(name) annotations.</jc>
3876       *    <ja>@Marshalled</ja>(typeName=<js>"foo"</js>)
3877       *    <jk>public class</jk> Foo {...}
3878       *    <ja>@Marshalled</ja>(typeName=<js>"bar"</js>)
3879       *    <jk>public class</jk> Bar {...}
3880       *
3881       *    <jc>// Create a serializer that uses 't' instead of '_type' for dictionary names.</jc>
3882       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
3883       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
3884       *       .typePropertyName(<js>"t"</js>)
3885       *       .dictionary(Foo.<jk>class</jk>, Bar.<jk>class</jk>)
3886       *       .build();
3887       *
3888       *    <jc>// Create a serializer that uses 't' instead of '_type' for dictionary names.</jc>
3889       *    ReaderParser <jv>parser</jv> = JsonParser
3890       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
3891       *       .typePropertyName(<js>"t"</js>)
3892       *       .dictionary(Foo.<jk>class</jk>, Bar.<jk>class</jk>)
3893       *       .build();
3894       *
3895       *    <jc>// A bean with a field with an indeterminate type.</jc>
3896       *    <jk>public class</jk> MyBean {
3897       *       <jk>public</jk> Object <jf>mySimpleField</jf>;
3898       *    }
3899       *
3900       *    <jc>// Produces "{mySimpleField:{t:'foo',...}}".</jc>
3901       *    String <jv>json</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jk>new</jk> MyBean());
3902       *
3903       *    <jc>// Parse bean.</jc>
3904       *    MyBean <jv>bean</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>json</jv>, MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);
3905       * </p>
3906       *
3907       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
3908       *    <li class='ja'>{@link Marshalled#typePropertyName()}
3909       *    <li class='ja'>{@link MarshalledConfig#typePropertyName()}
3910       * </ul>
3911       *
3912       * @param value
3913       *    The new value for this setting.
3914       *    <br>The default is <js>"_type"</js>.
3915       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
3916       * @return This object.
3917       */
3918      public Builder typePropertyName(String value) {
3919         typePropertyName = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
3920         return this;
3921      }
3922
3923      /**
3924       * Use Java Introspector.
3925       *
3926       * <p>
3927       * Using the built-in Java bean introspector will not pick up fields or non-standard getters/setters.
3928       * <br>Most {@link Bean @Marshalled} annotations will be ignored.
3929       *
3930       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
3931       * <p class='bjava'>
3932       *    <jc>// Create a serializer that only uses the built-in java bean introspector for finding properties.</jc>
3933       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = JsonSerializer
3934       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
3935       *       .useJavaBeanIntrospector()
3936       *       .build();
3937       * </p>
3938       *
3939       * @return This object.
3940       */
3941      public Builder useJavaBeanIntrospector() {
3942         return useJavaBeanIntrospector(true);
3943      }
3944
3945      /**
3946       * Same as {@link #useJavaBeanIntrospector()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
3947       *
3948       * @param value The value for this setting.
3949       * @return This object.
3950       */
3951      public Builder useJavaBeanIntrospector(boolean value) {
3952         useJavaBeanIntrospector = value;
3953         return this;
3954      }
3955   }
3956
3957   /*
3958    * The default package pattern exclusion list.
3959    * Any beans in packages in this list will not be considered beans.
3960    */
3961   // @formatter:off
3962   private static final List<String> DEFAULT_NOTBEAN_PACKAGES = l(
3963      "java.lang",
3964      "java.lang.annotation",
3965      "java.lang.ref",
3966      "java.lang.reflect",
3967      "java.io",
3968      "java.net",
3969      "java.nio.*",
3970      "java.util.*"
3971   );
3972   // @formatter:on
3973
3974   /*
3975    * The default bean class exclusion list.
3976    * Anything in this list will not be considered beans.
3977    */
3978   // @formatter:off
3979   private static final List<ClassInfo> DEFAULT_NOTBEAN_CLASSES = l(
3980      info(Map.class),
3981      info(Collection.class),
3982      info(Reader.class),
3983      info(Writer.class),
3984      info(InputStream.class),
3985      info(OutputStream.class),
3986      info(Throwable.class)
3987   );
3988   // @formatter:on
3989
3990   /** Default config.  All default settings. */
3991   public static final MarshallingContext DEFAULT = create().build();
3992
3993   /** Default reusable unmodifiable session.  Can be used to avoid overhead of creating a session (for creating BeanMaps for example).*/
3994   public static final MarshallingSession DEFAULT_SESSION = DEFAULT.createSession().unmodifiable().build();
3995
3996   /**
3997    * Creates a new builder for this object.
3998    *
3999    * @return A new builder.
4000    */
4001   public static Builder create() {
4002      return new Builder();
4003   }
4004
4005   /**
4006    * Checks if the specified class should be cached.
4007    *
4008    * <p>
4009    * Generated classes (proxies, lambda expressions, etc.) shouldn't be cacheable to prevent
4010    * needlessly filling up the cache.
4011    *
4012    * @param c The class to check.
4013    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the class should be cached.
4014    */
4015   private static boolean isCacheable(Class<?> c) {
4016      var n = c.getName();
4017      var x = n.charAt(n.length() - 1);  // All generated classes appear to end with digits.
4018      return !((x >= '0' && x <= '9') && (n.indexOf("$$") != -1 || n.startsWith("sun") || n.startsWith("com.sun") || n.indexOf("$Proxy") != -1));
4019   }
4020
4021   private final NullableSupplier<WriterSerializer> beanToStringSerializer;
4022   private final NullableSupplier<BeanConfigContext> beanConfigContext;
4023   private final BeanRegistry beanRegistry;
4024   private final MarshallingSession defaultSession;
4025   private final ConfigurableConverter converter;
4026   private final boolean beanMapPutReturnsOldValue;
4027   private final boolean beansRequireDefaultConstructor;
4028   private final boolean beansRequireSerializable;
4029   private final boolean beansRequireSettersForGetters;
4030   private final boolean beansRequireSomeProperties;
4031   private final boolean findFluentSetters;
4032   private final boolean ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters;
4033   private final boolean ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters;
4034   private final boolean ignoreMissingSetters;
4035   private final boolean ignoreTransientFields;
4036   private final boolean ignoreUnknownBeanProperties;
4037   private final boolean ignoreUnknownEnumValues;
4038   private final boolean ignoreUnknownNullBeanProperties;
4039   private final boolean unsortedProperties;
4040   private final boolean useInterfaceProxies;
4041   private final boolean useJavaBeanIntrospector;
4042   private final boolean validateSchema;
4043   private final Class<? extends PropertyNamer> propertyNamer;
4044   private final ClassMeta<Object> cmObject;  // Reusable ClassMeta that represents general Objects.
4045   private final ClassMeta<String> cmString;  // Reusable ClassMeta that represents general Strings.
4046   private final HashKey hashKey;
4047   private final List<ClassInfo> beanDictionary;
4048   private final List<ClassInfo> notBeanClasses;
4049   private final List<Object> swaps;
4050   private final List<String> notBeanPackages;
4051   private final Locale locale;
4052   private final Cache<Class,ClassMeta> cmCache;
4053   private final MediaType mediaType;
4054   private final List<ObjectSwap<?,?>> objectSwaps;
4055   private final PropertyNamer propertyNamerBean;
4056   private final String typePropertyName;
4057   private final Set<String> notBeanPackageNames;
4058   private final List<String> notBeanPackagePrefixes;
4059   private final TimeZone timeZone;
4060   private final DurationFormat durationFormat;
4061   private final PeriodFormat periodFormat;
4062   private final CalendarFormat calendarFormat;
4063   private final DateFormat dateFormat;
4064   private final TemporalFormat temporalFormat;
4065   private final TimeZoneFormat timeZoneFormat;
4066   private final LocaleFormat localeFormat;
4067   private final BinaryFormat binaryFormat;
4068   private final EnumFormat enumFormat;
4069   private final UuidFormat uuidFormat;
4070   private final BitSetFormat bitSetFormat;
4071   private final BigNumberFormat bigNumberFormat;
4072   private final BooleanFormat booleanFormat;
4073   private final FloatFormat floatFormat;
4074   private final CurrencyFormat currencyFormat;
4075   private final ClassFormat classFormat;
4076   private final ClassLoader classLoader;
4077   private final Visibility beanClassVisibility;
4078   private final Visibility beanConstructorVisibility;
4079   private final Visibility beanFieldVisibility;
4080   private final Visibility beanMethodVisibility;
4081   private final BeanStore beanStore;
4082   private final String activeView;
4083   private final boolean defaultViewInclusion;
4084
4085   /**
4086    * Constructor.
4087    *
4088    * @param builder The builder for this object.
4089    */
4090   public MarshallingContext(Builder builder) {
4091      super(builder);
4092
4093      beanClassVisibility = builder.beanClassVisibility;
4094      beanConstructorVisibility = builder.beanConstructorVisibility;
4095      beanDictionary = u(copyOf(builder.beanDictionary));
4096      beanFieldVisibility = builder.beanFieldVisibility;
4097      beanMapPutReturnsOldValue = builder.beanMapPutReturnsOldValue;
4098      beanMethodVisibility = builder.beanMethodVisibility;
4099      beansRequireDefaultConstructor = builder.beansRequireDefaultConstructor;
4100      beansRequireSerializable = builder.beansRequireSerializable;
4101      beansRequireSettersForGetters = builder.beansRequireSettersForGetters;
4102      beansRequireSomeProperties = ! builder.disableBeansRequireSomeProperties;
4103      findFluentSetters = builder.findFluentSetters;
4104      hashKey = builder.hashKey();
4105      ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters = builder.ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters;
4106      ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters = builder.ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters;
4107      ignoreMissingSetters = ! builder.disableIgnoreMissingSetters;
4108      ignoreTransientFields = ! builder.disableIgnoreTransientFields;
4109      ignoreUnknownBeanProperties = builder.ignoreUnknownBeanProperties;
4110      ignoreUnknownEnumValues = builder.ignoreUnknownEnumValues;
4111      ignoreUnknownNullBeanProperties = ! builder.disableIgnoreUnknownNullBeanProperties;
4112      locale = o(builder.locale).orElse(Locale.getDefault());
4113      mediaType = builder.mediaType;
4114      notBeanPackages = u(new ArrayList<>(builder.notBeanPackages));
4115      propertyNamer = nn(builder.propertyNamer) ? builder.propertyNamer : BasicPropertyNamer.class;
4116      unsortedProperties = builder.unsortedProperties;
4117      swaps = u(copyOf(builder.swaps));
4118      timeZone = builder.timeZone;
4119      durationFormat = builder.durationFormat;
4120      periodFormat = builder.periodFormat;
4121      calendarFormat = builder.calendarFormat;
4122      dateFormat = builder.dateFormat;
4123      temporalFormat = builder.temporalFormat;
4124      timeZoneFormat = builder.timeZoneFormat;
4125      localeFormat = builder.localeFormat;
4126      binaryFormat = builder.binaryFormat;
4127      enumFormat = builder.enumFormat;
4128      uuidFormat = builder.uuidFormat;
4129      bitSetFormat = builder.bitSetFormat;
4130      bigNumberFormat = builder.bigNumberFormat;
4131      booleanFormat = builder.booleanFormat;
4132      floatFormat = builder.floatFormat;
4133      currencyFormat = builder.currencyFormat;
4134      classFormat = builder.classFormat;
4135      classLoader = builder.classLoader;
4136      typePropertyName = o(builder.typePropertyName).orElse("_type");
4137      useInterfaceProxies = ! builder.disableInterfaceProxies;
4138      useJavaBeanIntrospector = builder.useJavaBeanIntrospector;
4139      validateSchema = builder.validateSchema;
4140      beanStore = builder.beanStore;
4141      activeView = builder.activeView;
4142      defaultViewInclusion = ! builder.disableDefaultViewInclusion;
4143
4144      var builderNotBeanClasses = new ArrayList<>(builder.notBeanClasses);
4145      notBeanClasses = builderNotBeanClasses.isEmpty() ? DEFAULT_NOTBEAN_CLASSES : Stream.concat(builderNotBeanClasses.stream(), DEFAULT_NOTBEAN_CLASSES.stream()).distinct().toList();
4146
4147      List<String> notBeanPackagesList = notBeanPackages.isEmpty() ? DEFAULT_NOTBEAN_PACKAGES : Stream.concat(notBeanPackages.stream(), DEFAULT_NOTBEAN_PACKAGES.stream()).toList();
4148      LinkedHashSet<String> notBeanPackageNamesTemp = notBeanPackagesList.stream().filter(x -> ! x.endsWith(".*")).collect(Collectors.toCollection(LinkedHashSet::new));
4149      notBeanPackageNames = u(notBeanPackageNamesTemp);
4150      notBeanPackagePrefixes = notBeanPackagesList.stream().filter(x -> x.endsWith(".*")).map(x -> x.substring(0, x.length() - 2)).toList();
4151
4152      propertyNamerBean = safe(()->propertyNamer.getDeclaredConstructor().newInstance());
4153
4154      var objectSwapsList = new LinkedList<ObjectSwap<?,?>>();
4155      swaps.forEach(x -> {
4156         if (x instanceof ObjectSwap<?,?> os) {
4157            objectSwapsList.add(os);
4158         } else {
4159            var ci = info((Class<?>)x);
4160            if (ci.isAssignableTo(ObjectSwap.class))
4161               objectSwapsList.add(BeanInstantiator.of(ObjectSwap.class).type(ci).run());
4162            else if (ci.isAssignableTo(Surrogate.class))
4163               objectSwapsList.addAll(SurrogateSwap.findObjectSwaps(ci.inner(), this));
4164            else
4165               throw rex("Invalid class {0} specified in MarshallingContext.swaps property.  Must be a subclass of ObjectSwap or Surrogate.", cn(ci.inner()));
4166         }
4167      });
4168      objectSwaps = u(objectSwapsList);
4169      converter = new ConfigurableConverter(this);
4170
4171      cmCache = Cache.<Class,ClassMeta>create().supplier(type -> new ClassMeta<>(type, this)).build();
4172      cmString = cmCache.get(String.class);
4173      cmObject = cmCache.get(Object.class);
4174
4175      beanRegistry = new BeanRegistry(this, null, list());
4176      defaultSession = createSession().unmodifiable().build();
4177      beanToStringSerializer = memoize(() -> Json5Serializer.create().marshallingContext(this).build());
4178      beanConfigContext = memoize(this::buildBeanConfigContext);
4179   }
4180
4181   /*
4182    * Builds the {@link BeanConfigContext} snapshot exposed by {@link #getBeanConfigContext()}.
4183    *
4184    * Lifts the bean-modeling subset of this context's settings into a portable POJO that the bean-modeling
4185    * runtime in {@code commons.bean} can consume without referencing any marshalling-aware types.
4186    */
4187   private BeanConfigContext buildBeanConfigContext() {
4188      return BeanConfigContext.create()
4189         .beanClassVisibility(beanClassVisibility)
4190         .beanConstructorVisibility(beanConstructorVisibility)
4191         .beanFieldVisibility(beanFieldVisibility)
4192         .beanMethodVisibility(beanMethodVisibility)
4193         .beanMapPutReturnsOldValue(beanMapPutReturnsOldValue)
4194         .beansRequireDefaultConstructor(beansRequireDefaultConstructor)
4195         .beansRequireSerializable(beansRequireSerializable)
4196         .beansRequireSettersForGetters(beansRequireSettersForGetters)
4197         .beansRequireSomeProperties(beansRequireSomeProperties)
4198         .findFluentSetters(findFluentSetters)
4199         .ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters(ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters)
4200         .ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters(ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters)
4201         .ignoreMissingSetters(ignoreMissingSetters)
4202         .ignoreTransientFields(ignoreTransientFields)
4203         .ignoreUnknownBeanProperties(ignoreUnknownBeanProperties)
4204         .ignoreUnknownNullBeanProperties(ignoreUnknownNullBeanProperties)
4205         .unsortedProperties(unsortedProperties)
4206         .useInterfaceProxies(useInterfaceProxies)
4207         .useJavaBeanIntrospector(useJavaBeanIntrospector)
4208         .propertyNamer(propertyNamerBean)
4209         .beanTypePropertyName(typePropertyName)
4210         .notBeanPackageNames(notBeanPackageNames)
4211         .notBeanPackagePrefixes(notBeanPackagePrefixes)
4212         .notBeanClasses(notBeanClasses.stream().map(ClassInfo::inner).toList())
4213         .beanStore(beanStore)
4214         .annotationProvider(getAnnotationProvider())
4215         .beanMetaInitializer(MarshalledBeanMetaInitializer.INSTANCE)
4216         .beanPropertyPostProcessor(MarshalledPropertyPostProcessor.INSTANCE)
4217         .build();
4218   }
4219
4220   /**
4221    * Converts the specified value to the specified class type.
4222    *
4223    * <p>
4224    * This is a shortcut for the following code:  <c>createSession().build().convertToType(<jv>value</jv>, <jv>type</jv>);</c>
4225    *
4226    * @param <T> The class type to convert the value to.
4227    * @param value The value to convert.
4228    * @param type The class type to convert the value to.
4229    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If the specified value cannot be converted to the specified type.
4230    * @return The converted value.
4231    * @see MarshallingSession#convertToType(Object, Class)
4232    */
4233   public final <T> T convertToType(Object value, Class<T> type) throws InvalidDataConversionException {
4234      return defaultSession.convertToType(value, type);
4235   }
4236
4237   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
4238   public Builder copy() {
4239      return new Builder(this);
4240   }
4241
4242   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
4243   public MarshallingSession.Builder<?> createSession() {
4244      return MarshallingSession.create(this);
4245   }
4246
4247   /**
4248    * Minimum bean class visibility.
4249    *
4250    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanClassVisibility(Visibility)
4251    * @return
4252    *    Classes are not considered beans unless they meet the minimum visibility requirements.
4253    */
4254   public final Visibility getBeanClassVisibility() { return beanClassVisibility; }
4255
4256   /**
4257    * Minimum bean constructor visibility.
4258    *
4259    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanConstructorVisibility(Visibility)
4260    * @return
4261    *    Only look for constructors with this specified minimum visibility.
4262    */
4263   public final Visibility getBeanConstructorVisibility() { return beanConstructorVisibility; }
4264
4265   /**
4266    * The bean store used for factory-based instantiation.
4267    *
4268    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanStore(BeanStore)
4269    * @return The bean store, or <jk>null</jk> if none configured.
4270    */
4271   public final BeanStore getBeanStore() { return beanStore; }
4272
4273   /**
4274    * Bean dictionary.
4275    *
4276    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanDictionary()
4277    * @return
4278    *    The list of classes that make up the bean dictionary in this bean context.
4279    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
4280    *    <br>List is unmodifiable.
4281    */
4282   public final List<ClassInfo> getBeanDictionary() { return beanDictionary; }
4283
4284   /**
4285    * Returns the {@link BeanConfigContext} snapshot for this marshalling context.
4286    *
4287    * <p>
4288    * The snapshot lifts the bean-modeling subset of this context's settings into a portable POJO that the
4289    * bean-modeling runtime in {@code commons.bean} can consume without referencing any marshalling-aware types.
4290    * It is computed lazily on first access and cached for the lifetime of this context.
4291    *
4292    * <p>
4293    * Mutating the returned snapshot's settings (via {@link BeanConfigContext#copy()} and a fresh build) does not
4294    * affect this marshalling context.
4295    *
4296    * @return The bean-modeling configuration snapshot.  Never <jk>null</jk>.
4297    */
4298   public final BeanConfigContext getBeanConfigContext() { return beanConfigContext.get(); }
4299
4300   /**
4301    * Minimum bean field visibility.
4302    *
4303    *
4304    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanFieldVisibility(Visibility)
4305    * @return
4306    *    Only look for bean fields with this specified minimum visibility.
4307    */
4308   public final Visibility getBeanFieldVisibility() { return beanFieldVisibility; }
4309
4310   /**
4311    * Returns the converter for this context.
4312    *
4313    * @return The converter.
4314    */
4315   public final ConfigurableConverter getConverter() { return converter; }
4316
4317   /**
4318    * Implements {@link ConversionFinder} to provide all MarshallingContext-specific type conversions that cannot
4319    * be expressed in {@link BasicConverter} (which has no dependency on {@code juneau-marshall}).
4320    *
4321    * <p>
4322    * Conversions are resolved in this priority order:
4323    * <ol>
4324    *    <li>ObjectSwap-based conversions (highest priority)
4325    *    <li>Iso8601 date/time formatting and parsing
4326    *    <li>Epoch-millis to date/time
4327    *    <li>Map/Bean/Collection/Array to String via serializer
4328    *    <li>String/CharSequence to Array, Map, Collection via JSON parsing
4329    *    <li>Map to Bean and String to Bean via BeanMap
4330    *    <li>Calendar/Date specialized copies
4331    *    <li>InputStream and Reader construction
4332    * </ol>
4333    *
4334    * @param inType The input type class.
4335    * @param outType The output type class.
4336    * @return A matching {@link Conversion}, or {@code null} if none applies.
4337    */
4338   @Override
4339   @SuppressWarnings({
4340      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for comprehensive conversion dispatch
4341      "java:S6541", // Brain Method: conversion dispatch inherently requires handling many type pairs in one place
4342      "null"        // `builder` is guarded by `nn(builder)` before access; Eclipse doesn't recognise `nn()` as a null-check function.
4343   })
4344   public Conversion<?,?> findConversion(Class<?> inType, Class<?> outType) {
4345      var toMeta = getClassMeta(outType);
4346      var fromMeta = getClassMeta(inType);
4347
4348      // --- ObjectSwap conversions (must come first) ---
4349      for (var swap : objectSwaps) {
4350         var nc = swap.getNormalClass().inner();
4351         var fc = swap.getSwapClass().inner();
4352         // Unswap: input is swap class (or convertible to it), output is normal class
4353         if (nc.isAssignableFrom(outType) && (fc.isAssignableFrom(inType) || Map.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) || Number.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))) {
4354            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4355               try {
4356                  var bs = marshallingSession(session);
4357                  var resolvedSwap = bs != null ? toMeta.getSwap(bs) : null;
4358                  var activeSwap = (ObjectSwap<Object,Object>) (resolvedSwap != null ? resolvedSwap : swap);
4359                  var swapClass = activeSwap.getSwapClass().inner();
4360                  // Direct match
4361                  if (swapClass.isInstance(in))
4362                     return activeSwap.unswap(bs, in, toMeta);
4363                  // Intermediate Map conversion
4364                  if (Map.class.isAssignableFrom(swapClass) && in instanceof Map)
4365                     return activeSwap.unswap(bs, converter.to(in, memberOf, bs, swapClass), toMeta);
4366                  // Intermediate Number conversion
4367                  if (Number.class.isAssignableFrom(swapClass) && in instanceof Number)
4368                     return activeSwap.unswap(bs, converter.to(in, memberOf, bs, swapClass), toMeta);
4369                  return null;
4370               } catch (Exception e) {
4371                  throw rex(e);
4372               }
4373            };
4374         }
4375         // Swap: input is normal class, output is swap class
4376         if (nc.isAssignableFrom(inType) && fc.isAssignableFrom(outType)) {
4377            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4378               try {
4379                  var bs = marshallingSession(session);
4380                  return ((ObjectSwap<Object,Object>) swap).swap(bs, in);
4381               } catch (Exception e) {
4382                  throw rex(e);
4383               }
4384            };
4385         }
4386      }
4387
4388      // --- Inline/auto-detected swaps from ClassMeta (e.g. AutoNumberSwap, AutoObjectSwap) ---
4389      // These are swaps found on the class itself (via swap() methods, toXxx() patterns, etc.)
4390      // and not registered in the objectSwaps list.
4391      var toSwap = toMeta.getSwap(null);
4392      if (toSwap != null) {
4393         // Use boxed version of swap class to handle primitive swap types (e.g. toInt() → int.class → Integer.class)
4394         var fcBoxed = info(toSwap.getSwapClass().inner()).getWrapperIfPrimitive().inner();
4395         if (fcBoxed.isAssignableFrom(inType) || Map.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) || Number.class.isAssignableFrom(inType)) {
4396            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4397               try {
4398               var bs = marshallingSession(session);
4399               var activeSwap = (ObjectSwap<Object,Object>) toMeta.getSwap(bs);
4400                  if (activeSwap == null) return null;
4401                  // Use boxed swap class to handle primitive return types (e.g. int.class → Integer.class)
4402                  var swapClass = info(activeSwap.getSwapClass().inner()).getWrapperIfPrimitive().inner();
4403                  if (swapClass.isInstance(in))
4404                     return activeSwap.unswap(bs, in, toMeta);
4405                  if (Map.class.isAssignableFrom(swapClass) && in instanceof Map)
4406                     return activeSwap.unswap(bs, converter.to(in, memberOf, bs, swapClass), toMeta);
4407                  if (Number.class.isAssignableFrom(swapClass) && in instanceof Number)
4408                     return activeSwap.unswap(bs, converter.to(in, memberOf, bs, swapClass), toMeta);
4409                  return null;
4410               } catch (Exception e) {
4411                  throw rex(e);
4412               }
4413            };
4414         }
4415      }
4416      var fromSwap = fromMeta.getSwap(null);
4417      if (fromSwap != null) {
4418         var fcBoxed = info(fromSwap.getSwapClass().inner()).getWrapperIfPrimitive().inner();
4419         if (fcBoxed.isAssignableFrom(outType) || outType == Object.class) {
4420            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4421               try {
4422               var bs = marshallingSession(session);
4423               var activeSwap = (ObjectSwap<Object,Object>) fromMeta.getSwap(bs);
4424                  if (activeSwap == null) return null;
4425                  return activeSwap.swap(bs, in);
4426               } catch (Exception e) {
4427                  throw rex(e);
4428               }
4429            };
4430         }
4431      }
4432
4433      // --- Date/time → CharSequence via Iso8601Utils (Gap 5) ---
4434      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(outType) && (fromMeta.isDateOrCalendarOrTemporal() || fromMeta.isDuration()))
4435         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Iso8601Utils.format(in, fromMeta, sessionTimeZone(session));
4436
4437      // --- CharSequence → date/time via Iso8601Utils (Gap 6) ---
4438      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && (toMeta.isDateOrCalendarOrTemporal() || toMeta.isDuration()))
4439         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Iso8601Utils.parse(in.toString(), toMeta, sessionTimeZone(session));
4440
4441      // --- Number → date/time via epoch millis (Gap 7) ---
4442      if (Number.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && toMeta.isDateOrCalendarOrTemporal())
4443         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> Iso8601Utils.fromEpochMillis(((Number)in).longValue(), toMeta, sessionTimeZone(session));
4444
4445      // --- Map/Bean/Collection/Array/Optional → String via serializer (Gap 14) ---
4446      if (outType == String.class) {
4447         // byte[] → String must come before isCollectionOrArrayOrOptional since byte[] is an array type
4448         if (byte[].class == inType)
4449            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> new String((byte[]) in, StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
4450         if (fromMeta.isMapOrBean() || fromMeta.isCollectionOrArrayOrOptional()) {
4451            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4452               try {
4453                  var ws = getBeanToStringSerializer();
4454                  return ws != null ? ws.serialize(in) : in.toString();
4455               } catch (Exception e) {
4456                  throw rex(e);
4457               }
4458            };
4459         }
4460         if (Class.class == inType)
4461            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> ((Class<?>) in).getName();
4462      }
4463
4464      // --- CharSequence → Array via JSON parsing (Gap 10) ---
4465      // Excludes byte[] since that is handled by BasicConverter.findSpecialConversion (getBytes(UTF_8)).
4466      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && outType.isArray() && outType != byte[].class) {
4467         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4468            try {
4469               var bs = beanSessionOrDefault(session);
4470               var str = in.toString();
4471               Json5List list;
4472               if (startsWith(str, '['))
4473                  list = Json5List.ofString(str).setBeanSession(bs);
4474               else
4475                  list = new Json5List((Object[]) splita(str)).setBeanSession(bs);
4476               return bs.convertToType(list, outType);
4477            } catch (Exception e) {
4478               throw rex(e);
4479            }
4480         };
4481      }
4482
4483      // --- CharSequence → Map via JSON parsing (Gap 11) ---
4484      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && Map.class.isAssignableFrom(outType) && !toMeta.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(null)) {
4485         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4486            try {
4487               var bs = beanSessionOrDefault(session);
4488               var m = Json5Map.ofString(in.toString());
4489               m.setBeanSession(bs);
4490               return bs.convertToType(m, outType);
4491            } catch (Exception e) {
4492               throw rex(e);
4493            }
4494         };
4495      }
4496
4497      // --- Collection/Array → Collection with session-aware element conversion ---
4498      // When the target is an abstract collection type (List, Collection), uses JsonList instead of ArrayList
4499      // to preserve the session-aware default behavior from the original convertToCollectionType.
4500      if ((Collection.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) || inType.isArray()) && Collection.class.isAssignableFrom(outType)) {
4501         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4502            // Treat Object.class as "no element type" (untyped/raw, needs no element conversion).
4503            var elemType = args.length > 0 && args[0] != Object.class ? (Class<?>) args[0] : null;
4504            if (elemType == null && !inType.isArray() && outType.isAssignableFrom(in.getClass()))
4505               return in;
4506            var bs = beanSessionOrDefault(session);
4507            Collection<Object> result;
4508            if (outType.isAssignableFrom(JsonList.class)) {
4509               result = new JsonList(bs);  // Use JsonList for abstract types (List, Collection, Iterable)
4510            } else {
4511               result = newCollection(outType);
4512            }
4513            if (in instanceof Collection<?> col2) {
4514               for (var elem : col2)
4515                  result.add(elemType != null ? converter.to(elem, memberOf, session, elemType) : elem);
4516            } else {
4517               var len = Array.getLength(in);
4518               for (var i = 0; i < len; i++) {
4519                  var elem = Array.get(in, i);
4520                  result.add(elemType != null ? converter.to(elem, memberOf, session, elemType) : elem);
4521               }
4522            }
4523            return result;
4524         };
4525      }
4526
4527      // --- Map → Collection (wraps map as single element, preserving old convertToCollectionType behavior) ---
4528      if (Map.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && Collection.class.isAssignableFrom(outType)) {
4529         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4530            var bs = beanSessionOrDefault(session);
4531            Collection<Object> result;
4532            if (outType.isAssignableFrom(JsonList.class)) {
4533               result = new JsonList(bs);
4534            } else {
4535               result = newCollection(outType);
4536            }
4537            var elemType = args.length > 0 && args[0] != Object.class ? (Class<?>) args[0] : null;
4538            result.add(elemType != null ? converter.to(in, memberOf, session, elemType) : in);
4539            return result;
4540         };
4541      }
4542
4543      // --- CharSequence → Collection via JSON parsing (Gap 12) ---
4544      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && Collection.class.isAssignableFrom(outType)) {
4545         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4546            try {
4547               var bs = beanSessionOrDefault(session);
4548               var str = in.toString();
4549               if (!isProbablyJsonArray(str, false))
4550                  throw rex("Cannot convert string to {0}: {1}", outType.getName(), str);
4551               var elemType = args.length > 0 ? args[0] : null;
4552               var l2 = Json5List.ofString(str).setBeanSession(bs);
4553               var result = newCollection(outType);
4554               l2.forEach(x -> result.add(elemType != null && x != null ? converter.to(x, elemType) : x));
4555               return result;
4556            } catch (Exception e) {
4557               throw rex(e);
4558            }
4559         };
4560      }
4561
4562      // --- Map → Bean via BeanMap/BuilderSwap/BeanRegistry (Gap 17) ---
4563      if (Map.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && toMeta.isBean()) {
4564         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4565            try {
4566               var bs = beanSessionOrDefault(session);
4567               var m2 = (Map<?,?>) in;
4568               var builder = (BuilderSwap<Object,Object>) toMeta.getBuilderSwap(bs);
4569               if (m2 instanceof MarshalledMap mm && builder == null) {
4570                  var typeName = mm.getString(bs.getBeanTypePropertyName(toMeta));
4571                  if (nn(typeName)) {
4572                     var cm = toMeta.getBeanRegistry().getClassMeta(typeName);
4573                     if (nn(cm) && toMeta.isAssignableFrom(cm.inner()))
4574                        return mm.cast(cm);
4575                  }
4576               }
4577               if (nn(builder)) {
4578                  var created = builder.create(bs, toMeta);
4579                  if (created != null) {
4580                     var bm = bs.toBeanMap(created);
4581                     bm.load(m2);
4582                     return builder.build(bs, bm.getBean(), toMeta);
4583                  }
4584               }
4585               return bs.newBeanMap(toMeta.inner()).load(m2).getBean();
4586            } catch (Exception e) {
4587               throw rex(e);
4588            }
4589         };
4590      }
4591
4592      // --- CharSequence → URL (URL(String) is deprecated in Java 20+, use URI.create().toURL() instead) ---
4593      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && outType == URL.class)
4594         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4595            try {
4596               return new URI(in.toString()).toURL();
4597            } catch (Exception e) {
4598               throw rex(e);
4599            }
4600         };
4601
4602      // --- CharSequence → Bean via BeanMap (Gap 21) ---
4603      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && toMeta.isBean()) {
4604         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4605            try {
4606               var bs = beanSessionOrDefault(session);
4607               return BeanMapLoader.load(bs.newBeanMap(toMeta.inner()), in.toString()).getBean();
4608            } catch (Exception e) {
4609               throw rex(e);
4610            }
4611         };
4612      }
4613
4614      // --- Calendar/Date specialized conversions (Gap 19) ---
4615      if (toMeta.isCalendar()) {
4616         if (Calendar.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
4617            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4618               var c = (Calendar) in;
4619               var c2 = new GregorianCalendar(c.getTimeZone());
4620               c2.setTime(c.getTime());
4621               return c2;
4622            };
4623         if (Date.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
4624            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4625               var c2 = new GregorianCalendar(TimeZone.getDefault());
4626               c2.setTime((Date) in);
4627               return c2;
4628            };
4629         if (Temporal.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
4630            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4631               var temporal = (Temporal) in;
4632               Instant instant;
4633               try {
4634               instant = Instant.from(temporal);
4635               } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") DateTimeException e) {
4636               // LocalDateTime lacks offset info - interpret using session/system timezone
4637               var tz = sessionTimeZone(session);
4638               var zoneId = tz != null ? tz.toZoneId() : ZoneId.systemDefault();
4639               instant = LocalDateTime.from(temporal).atZone(zoneId).toInstant();
4640            }
4641            return Iso8601Utils.fromEpochMillis(instant.toEpochMilli(), toMeta, sessionTimeZone(session));
4642            };
4643      }
4644      if (toMeta.isDate() && outType == Date.class) {
4645         if (Calendar.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
4646            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> ((Calendar) in).getTime();
4647         if (Temporal.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
4648            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4649               var temporal = (Temporal) in;
4650               Instant instant;
4651               try {
4652               instant = Instant.from(temporal);
4653               } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") DateTimeException e) {
4654               // LocalDateTime lacks offset info - interpret using session/system timezone
4655               var tz = sessionTimeZone(session);
4656               var zoneId = tz != null ? tz.toZoneId() : ZoneId.systemDefault();
4657               instant = LocalDateTime.from(temporal).atZone(zoneId).toInstant();
4658            }
4659            return Date.from(instant);
4660            };
4661      }
4662
4663      // --- byte[]/CharSequence → InputStream (Gap 18) ---
4664      if (InputStream.class.isAssignableFrom(outType)) {
4665         if (byte[].class == inType)
4666            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> { var b = (byte[]) in; return new ByteArrayInputStream(b, 0, b.length); };
4667         if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
4668            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> { var b = in.toString().getBytes(); return new ByteArrayInputStream(b, 0, b.length); };
4669      }
4670
4671      // --- byte[]/CharSequence → Reader (Gap 18) ---
4672      if (Reader.class.isAssignableFrom(outType)) {
4673         if (byte[].class == inType)
4674            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> new StringReader(new String((byte[]) in));
4675         if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType))
4676            return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> new StringReader(in.toString());
4677      }
4678
4679      // --- CharSequence → Enum using ClassMeta (respects ignoreUnknownEnumValues) (Gap 13) ---
4680      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && outType.isEnum()) {
4681         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4682            try {
4683               return toMeta.newInstanceFromString(memberOf, in.toString());
4684            } catch (Exception e) {
4685               throw rex(e);
4686            }
4687         };
4688      }
4689
4690      // --- CharSequence → CharSequence subtype via ClassMeta (Gap 15) ---
4691      if (CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && toMeta.isCharSequence() && outType != String.class && toMeta.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(null)) {
4692         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4693            try {
4694               return toMeta.newInstanceFromString(memberOf, in.toString());
4695            } catch (Exception e) {
4696               throw rex(e);
4697            }
4698         };
4699      }
4700
4701      // --- Array → CharSequence subtype via serializer (Gap 15) ---
4702      if (inType.isArray() && toMeta.isCharSequence() && outType != String.class && toMeta.canCreateNewInstanceFromString(null)) {
4703         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4704            try {
4705               var ws = getBeanToStringSerializer();
4706               var str = ws != null ? ws.serialize(in) : in.toString();
4707               return toMeta.newInstanceFromString(memberOf, str);
4708            } catch (Exception e) {
4709               throw rex(e);
4710            }
4711         };
4712      }
4713
4714      // --- Enum → T via toString() (allows Enum→Boolean, Enum→Number, etc.) ---
4715      // Excludes Enum→Enum (handled by BasicConverter) and Enum→String (handled by BasicConverter/CharSequence path).
4716      if (inType.isEnum() && !outType.isEnum() && !CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(outType)) {
4717         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> converter.to(in.toString(), memberOf, session, outType, args);
4718      }
4719
4720      // --- Object → Boolean via toString() (lenient: any non-"true" string is false) ---
4721      // Excludes CharSequence types (handled by BasicConverter), primitives (handled by CachingConverter nullDefault),
4722      // and types that BasicConverter already handles (e.g. via toBoolean() instance method).
4723      if ((outType == Boolean.class || outType == boolean.class) && !CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && !Number.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && inType != boolean.class && inType != Boolean.class && !BasicConverter.INSTANCE.canConvert(inType, Boolean.class)) {
4724         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> converter.to(in.toString(), memberOf, session, Boolean.class);
4725      }
4726
4727   // --- Object → Bean via toString() + BeanMap.load() (fallback for bean-compatible types) ---
4728   // Replicates the old convertToMemberType fallback for beans (newBeanMap + load + getBean).
4729   // Excludes cases where input is already assignable to output (handled by MarshallingSession isInstance shortcut).
4730      if (toMeta.isBean() && !Map.class.isAssignableFrom(inType) && !CharSequence.class.isAssignableFrom(inType)
4731            && !outType.isAssignableFrom(inType)) {
4732         return (in, memberOf, session, args) -> {
4733            try {
4734               var bs = beanSessionOrDefault(session);
4735               return BeanMapLoader.load(bs.newBeanMap(toMeta.inner()), in.toString()).getBean();
4736            } catch (Exception e) {
4737               throw rex(e);
4738            }
4739         };
4740      }
4741
4742      return null;
4743   }
4744
4745   private static TimeZone sessionTimeZone(ConverterSession session) {
4746      return session == null ? null : session.get(TimeZone.class).orElse(null);
4747   }
4748
4749   private static MarshallingSession marshallingSession(ConverterSession session) {
4750      return session instanceof MarshallingSession bs ? bs : null;
4751   }
4752
4753   private MarshallingSession beanSessionOrDefault(ConverterSession session) {
4754      return session instanceof MarshallingSession bs ? bs : defaultSession;
4755   }
4756
4757   private static Collection<Object> newCollection(Class<?> outType) {
4758      if (outType == List.class || outType == Collection.class || outType == Iterable.class || outType == AbstractList.class)
4759         return new ArrayList<>();
4760      if (outType == Set.class || outType == LinkedHashSet.class || outType == AbstractSet.class)
4761         return new LinkedHashSet<>();
4762      if (outType == SortedSet.class || outType == NavigableSet.class || outType == TreeSet.class)
4763         return new TreeSet<>();
4764      try {
4765         return (Collection<Object>) outType.getDeclaredConstructor().newInstance();
4766      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") Exception e) {
4767         return new ArrayList<>();
4768      }
4769   }
4770
4771   /**
4772    * Returns the {@link BeanMeta} class for the specified class.
4773    *
4774    * @param <T> The class type to get the meta-data on.
4775    * @param c The class to get the meta-data on.
4776    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
4777    * @return
4778    *    The {@link BeanMeta} for the specified class, or <jk>null</jk> if the class is not a bean per the settings on
4779    *    this context.
4780    */
4781   public final <T> BeanMeta<T> getBeanMeta(Class<T> c) {
4782      assertArgNotNull(ARG_c, c);
4783      return getClassMeta(c).getBeanMeta();
4784   }
4785
4786   /**
4787    * Minimum bean method visibility.
4788    *
4789    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanMethodVisibility(Visibility)
4790    * @return
4791    *    Only look for bean methods with this specified minimum visibility.
4792    */
4793   public final Visibility getBeanMethodVisibility() { return beanMethodVisibility; }
4794
4795
4796   /**
4797    * Bean type property name.
4798    *
4799    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#typePropertyName(String)
4800    * @return
4801    * The name of the bean property used to store the dictionary name of a bean type so that the parser knows the data type to reconstruct.
4802    */
4803   public final String getBeanTypePropertyName() { return typePropertyName; }
4804
4805   /**
4806    * Construct a {@code ClassMeta} wrapper around a {@link Class} object.
4807    *
4808    * @param <T> The class type being wrapped.
4809    * @param type The class to resolve.
4810    * @return
4811    *    If the class is not an array, returns a cached {@link ClassMeta} object.
4812    *    Otherwise, returns a new {@link ClassMeta} object every time.
4813    */
4814   public final <T> ClassMeta<T> getClassMeta(Class<T> type) {
4815      // Non-cacheable classes (proxies, generated classes) should not be cached
4816      if (! isCacheable(type))
4817         return new ClassMeta<>(type, this);
4818      return cmCache.get(type);
4819   }
4820
4821   /**
4822    * Used to resolve <c>ClassMetas</c> of type <c>Collection</c> and <c>Map</c> that have
4823    * <c>ClassMeta</c> values that themselves could be collections or maps.
4824    *
4825    * <p>
4826    * <c>Collection</c> meta objects are assumed to be followed by zero or one meta objects indicating the element type.
4827    *
4828    * <p>
4829    * <c>Map</c> meta objects are assumed to be followed by zero or two meta objects indicating the key and value types.
4830    *
4831    * <p>
4832    * The array can be arbitrarily long to indicate arbitrarily complex data structures.
4833    *
4834    * <h5 class='section'>Examples:</h5>
4835    * <ul>
4836    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(String.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A normal type.
4837    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(List.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A list containing objects.
4838    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(List.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A list containing strings.
4839    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(LinkedList.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A linked-list containing
4840    *       strings.
4841    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(LinkedList.<jk>class</jk>, LinkedList.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>);</code> -
4842    *       A linked-list containing linked-lists of strings.
4843    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(Map.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A map containing object keys/values.
4844    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(Map.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>);</code> - A map
4845    *       containing string keys/values.
4846    *    <li><code>getClassMeta(Map.<jk>class</jk>, String.<jk>class</jk>, List.<jk>class</jk>, MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);</code> -
4847    *       A map containing string keys and values of lists containing beans.
4848    * </ul>
4849    *
4850    * @param <T>
4851    *    The class to resolve.
4852    * @param type
4853    *    The class to resolve.
4854    *    <br>Can be any of the following: {@link ClassMeta}, {@link ClassInfo}, {@link Class}, {@link ParameterizedType}, {@link GenericArrayType}
4855    * @param args
4856    *    The type arguments of the class if it's a collection or map.
4857    *    <br>Can be any of the following: {@link ClassMeta}, {@link ClassInfo}, {@link Class}, {@link ParameterizedType}, {@link GenericArrayType}
4858    *    <br>Ignored if the main type is not a map or collection.
4859    * @return The resolved class meta.
4860    */
4861   public final <T> ClassMeta<T> getClassMeta(Type type, Type...args) {
4862      if (type == null)
4863         return null;
4864      ClassMeta<T> cm = null;
4865      if (type instanceof Class type2)
4866         cm = getClassMeta(type2);
4867      else
4868         cm = resolveClassMeta(type, null);
4869      if (args.length == 0)
4870         return cm;
4871      var cma = new ClassMeta<?>[args.length + 1];
4872      cma[0] = cm;
4873      for (var i = 0; i < length(args); i++) {
4874         var arg = (Type)Array.get(args, i);
4875         if (arg instanceof Class arg2)
4876            cma[i + 1] = getClassMeta(arg2);
4877         else
4878            cma[i + 1] = resolveClassMeta(arg, null);
4879      }
4880      return (ClassMeta<T>)getTypedClassMeta(cma, 0);
4881   }
4882
4883   /**
4884    * Shortcut for calling {@code getClassMeta(o.getClass())}.
4885    *
4886    * @param <T> The class of the object being passed in.
4887    * @param o The class to find the class type for.
4888    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
4889    * @return The ClassMeta object.
4890    */
4891   public final <T> ClassMeta<T> getClassMetaForObject(T o) {
4892      assertArgNotNull(ARG_o, o);
4893      return (ClassMeta<T>)getClassMeta(o.getClass());
4894   }
4895
4896   /**
4897    * Locale.
4898    *
4899    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#locale(Locale)
4900    * @return
4901    *    The default locale for serializer and parser sessions.
4902    */
4903   public final Locale getDefaultLocale() { return locale; }
4904
4905   /**
4906    * Media type.
4907    *
4908    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#mediaType(MediaType)
4909    * @return
4910    *    The default media type value for serializer and parser sessions.
4911    */
4912   public final MediaType getDefaultMediaType() { return mediaType; }
4913
4914   /**
4915    * Time zone.
4916    *
4917    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#timeZone(TimeZone)
4918    * @return
4919    *    The default timezone for serializer and parser sessions.
4920    */
4921   public final TimeZone getDefaultTimeZone() { return timeZone; }
4922
4923   /**
4924    * Bean package exclusions.
4925    *
4926    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#notBeanPackages(String...)
4927    * @return
4928    *    The set of fully-qualified package names to exclude from being classified as beans.
4929    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
4930    *    <br>Set is unmodifiable.
4931    *    <br>Backed by a {@link LinkedHashSet} to preserve insertion order.
4932    */
4933   public final Set<String> getNotBeanPackagesNames() { return notBeanPackageNames; }
4934
4935   /**
4936    * Bean property namer.
4937    *
4938    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#propertyNamer(Class)
4939    * @return
4940    *    The interface used to calculate bean property names.
4941    */
4942   public final PropertyNamer getPropertyNamer() { return propertyNamerBean; }
4943
4944   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
4945   public MarshallingSession getSession() { return defaultSession; }
4946
4947   /**
4948    * Java object swaps.
4949    *
4950    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#swaps(Class...)
4951    * @return
4952    *    The list POJO swaps defined.
4953    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
4954    *    <br>List is unmodifiable.
4955    */
4956   public final List<ObjectSwap<?,?>> getSwaps() { return objectSwaps; }
4957
4958   /**
4959    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the specified bean context shares the same cache as this bean context.
4960    *
4961    * <p>
4962    * Useful for testing purposes.
4963    *
4964    * @param bc The bean context to compare to.
4965    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
4966    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the bean contexts have equivalent settings and thus share caches.
4967    */
4968   public final boolean hasSameCache(MarshallingContext bc) {
4969      assertArgNotNull(ARG_bc, bc);
4970      return bc.getCmCache() == this.getCmCache();
4971   }
4972
4973   /**
4974    * BeanMap.put() returns old property value.
4975    *
4976    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beanMapPutReturnsOldValue()
4977    * @return
4978    *    <jk>true</jk> if the {@link BeanMap#put(String,Object) BeanMap.put()} method will return old property values.
4979    *    <br>Otherwise, it returns <jk>null</jk>.
4980    */
4981   public final boolean isBeanMapPutReturnsOldValue() { return beanMapPutReturnsOldValue; }
4982
4983   /**
4984    * Beans require no-arg constructors.
4985    *
4986    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beansRequireDefaultConstructor()
4987    * @return
4988    *    <jk>true</jk> if a Java class must implement a default no-arg constructor to be considered a bean.
4989    *    <br>Otherwise, the bean will be serialized as a string using the {@link Object#toString()} method.
4990    */
4991   public final boolean isBeansRequireDefaultConstructor() { return beansRequireDefaultConstructor; }
4992
4993   /**
4994    * Beans require Serializable interface.
4995    *
4996    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beansRequireSerializable()
4997    * @return
4998    *    <jk>true</jk> if a Java class must implement the {@link Serializable} interface to be considered a bean.
4999    *    <br>Otherwise, the bean will be serialized as a string using the {@link Object#toString()} method.
5000    */
5001   public final boolean isBeansRequireSerializable() { return beansRequireSerializable; }
5002
5003   /**
5004    * Beans require setters for getters.
5005    *
5006    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#beansRequireSettersForGetters()
5007    * @return
5008    *    <jk>true</jk> if only getters that have equivalent setters will be considered as properties on a bean.
5009    *    <br>Otherwise, they are ignored.
5010    */
5011   public final boolean isBeansRequireSettersForGetters() { return beansRequireSettersForGetters; }
5012
5013   /**
5014    * Beans require at least one property.
5015    *
5016    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#disableBeansRequireSomeProperties()
5017    * @return
5018    *    <jk>true</jk> if a Java class doesn't need to contain at least 1 property to be considered a bean.
5019    *    <br>Otherwise, the bean is serialized as a string using the {@link Object#toString()} method.
5020    */
5021   public final boolean isBeansRequireSomeProperties() { return beansRequireSomeProperties; }
5022
5023   /**
5024    * Find fluent setters.
5025    *
5026    * <h5 class='section'>Description:</h5>
5027    * <p>
5028    *
5029    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#findFluentSetters()
5030    * @return
5031    *    <jk>true</jk> if fluent setters are detected on beans.
5032    */
5033   public final boolean isFindFluentSetters() { return findFluentSetters; }
5034
5035   /**
5036    * Ignore invocation errors on getters.
5037    *
5038    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters()
5039    * @return
5040    *    <jk>true</jk> if errors thrown when calling bean getter methods are silently ignored.
5041    */
5042   public final boolean isIgnoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters() { return ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters; }
5043
5044   /**
5045    * Ignore invocation errors on setters.
5046    *
5047    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters()
5048    * @return
5049    *    <jk>true</jk> if errors thrown when calling bean setter methods are silently ignored.
5050    */
5051   public final boolean isIgnoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters() { return ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters; }
5052
5053   /**
5054    * Silently ignore missing setters.
5055    *
5056    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#disableIgnoreMissingSetters()
5057    * @return
5058    *    <jk>true</jk> if trying to set a value on a bean property without a setter should throw a {@link BeanRuntimeException}.
5059    */
5060   public final boolean isIgnoreMissingSetters() { return ignoreMissingSetters; }
5061
5062   /**
5063    * Ignore unknown properties.
5064    *
5065    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#ignoreUnknownBeanProperties()
5066    * @return
5067    *    <jk>true</jk> if trying to set a value on a non-existent bean property is silently ignored.
5068    *    <br>Otherwise, a {@code RuntimeException} is thrown.
5069    */
5070   public final boolean isIgnoreUnknownBeanProperties() { return ignoreUnknownBeanProperties; }
5071
5072   /**
5073    * Schema validation mode.
5074    *
5075    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#validateSchema()
5076    * @return
5077    *    <jk>true</jk> if bean property values should be validated against their {@code @Schema}-declared constraints
5078    *    during parsing and serialization.
5079    * @since 10.0.0
5080    */
5081   public final boolean isValidateSchema() { return validateSchema; }
5082
5083   /**
5084    * Ignore unknown enum values.
5085    *
5086    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#ignoreUnknownEnumValues()
5087    * @return
5088    *    <jk>true</jk> if unknown enum values should be set as <jk>null</jk> instead of throwing an exception.
5089    */
5090   public final boolean isIgnoreUnknownEnumValues() { return ignoreUnknownEnumValues; }
5091
5092   /**
5093    * Ignore unknown properties with null values.
5094    *
5095    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#disableIgnoreUnknownNullBeanProperties()
5096    * @return
5097    *    <jk>true</jk> if trying to set a <jk>null</jk> value on a non-existent bean property should throw a {@link BeanRuntimeException}.
5098    */
5099   public final boolean isIgnoreUnknownNullBeanProperties() { return ignoreUnknownNullBeanProperties; }
5100
5101   /**
5102    * Returns whether bean properties are unsorted (i.e. in natural JVM order rather than alphabetical).
5103    *
5104    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#unsortedProperties()
5105    * @return
5106    *    <jk>true</jk> if bean properties are in natural JVM order; <jk>false</jk> (the default) means alphabetical order.
5107    */
5108   public final boolean isUnsortedProperties() { return unsortedProperties; }
5109
5110   /**
5111    * Use interface proxies.
5112    *
5113    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#disableInterfaceProxies()
5114    * @return
5115    *    <jk>true</jk> if interfaces will be instantiated as proxy classes through the use of an
5116    *    {@link InvocationHandler} if there is no other way of instantiating them.
5117    */
