5118   public final boolean isUseInterfaceProxies() { return useInterfaceProxies; }
5119
5120   /**
5121    * Use Java Introspector.
5122    *
5123    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#useJavaBeanIntrospector()
5124    * @return
5125    *    <jk>true</jk> if the built-in Java bean introspector should be used for bean introspection.
5126    */
5127   public final boolean isUseJavaBeanIntrospector() { return useJavaBeanIntrospector; }
5128
5129   /**
5130    * Creates a new {@link BeanMap} object (a modifiable {@link Map}) of the given class with uninitialized
5131    * property values.
5132    *
5133    * <p>
5134    * This is a shortcut for the following code:  <c>createSession().build().newBeanMap(<jv>_class</jv>);</c>
5135    *
5136    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
5137    * <p class='bjava'>
5138    *    <jc>// Construct a new bean map wrapped around a new Person object</jc>
5139    *    BeanMap&lt;Person&gt; <jv>beanMap</jv> = MarshallingContext.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.newBeanMap(Person.<jk>class</jk>);
5140    * </p>
5141    *
5142    * @param <T> The class of the object being wrapped.
5143    * @param c The name of the class to create a new instance of.
5144    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
5145    * @return A new instance of the class.
5146    * @see MarshallingSession#newBeanMap(Class)
5147    */
5148   public <T> BeanMap<T> newBeanMap(Class<T> c) {
5149      assertArgNotNull(ARG_c, c);
5150      return defaultSession.newBeanMap(c);
5151   }
5152
5153   /**
5154    * Wraps an object inside a {@link BeanMap} object (a modifiable {@link Map}).
5155    *
5156    * <p>
5157    * This is a shortcut for the following code:  <c>createSession().build().toBeanMap(<jv>object</jv>);</c>
5158    *
5159    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
5160    * <p class='bjava'>
5161    *    <jc>// Construct a bean map around a bean instance</jc>
5162    *    BeanMap&lt;Person&gt; <jv>beanMap</jv> = MarshallingContext.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.toBeanMap(<jk>new</jk> Person());
5163    * </p>
5164    *
5165    * @param <T> The class of the object being wrapped.
5166    * @param object The object to wrap in a map interface.
5167    *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
5168    * @return The wrapped object.
5169    * @see MarshallingSession#toBeanMap(Object)
5170    */
5171   public <T> BeanMap<T> toBeanMap(T object) {
5172      assertArgNotNull(ARG_object, object);
5173      return defaultSession.toBeanMap(object);
5174   }
5175
5176   /**
5177    * Returns the lookup table for resolving bean types by name.
5178    *
5179    * @return The lookup table for resolving bean types by name.
5180    */
5181   protected final BeanRegistry getBeanRegistry() { return beanRegistry; }
5182
5183   /**
5184    * Returns the serializer to use for serializing beans when using the {@link MarshallingSession#convertToType(Object, Class)}
5185    * and related methods.
5186    *
5187    * @return The serializer.  May be <jk>null</jk> if all initialization has occurred.
5188    */
5189   protected WriterSerializer getBeanToStringSerializer() {
5190      return beanToStringSerializer.get();
5191   }
5192
5193   /**
5194    * Class metadata cache.
5195    *
5196    * @return The class metadata cache.
5197    */
5198   protected final Cache<Class,ClassMeta> getCmCache() { return cmCache; }
5199
5200
5201   /**

5203    *
5204    * @return The hash key.

5206   protected final HashKey getHashKey() { return hashKey; }

5208   /**
5209    * Locale.
5210    *
5211    * @return The locale.
5212    */
5213   protected final Locale getLocale() { return locale; }
5214
5215   /**
5216    * The default active view for sessions created from this context.
5217    *
5218    * <p>
5219    * Returns the view name set via {@link Builder#activeView(String)}, or <jk>null</jk> if no default
5220    * active view has been configured (all properties visible).
5221    *
5222    * @return The default active view, or <jk>null</jk>.
5223    * @since 10.0.0
5224    */
5225   public final String getActiveView() { return activeView; }
5226
5227   /**
5228    * Default-view-inclusion policy.
5229    *
5230    * <p>
5231    * Returns <jk>true</jk> (the default) when untagged properties — those carrying no
5232    * {@link MarshalledProp#view()} declaration — are included under every active view.
5233    * Returns <jk>false</jk> when {@link Builder#disableDefaultViewInclusion()} has been called,
5234    * in which case untagged properties are excluded when any active view is in effect.
5235    *
5236    * @return <jk>true</jk> if untagged properties are included under every active view.
5237    * @since 10.0.0
5238    */
5239   public final boolean isDefaultViewInclusion() { return defaultViewInclusion; }
5240
5241   /**
5242    * Media type.
5243    *
5244    * @return The media type.
5245    */
5246   protected final MediaType getMediaType() { return mediaType; }
5247
5248   /**
5249    * Bean class exclusions.
5250    *
5251    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#notBeanClasses(ClassInfo...)
5252    * @return
5253    *    The list of classes that are explicitly not beans.
5254    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
5255    *    <br>List is unmodifiable.
5256    */
5257   protected final List<ClassInfo> getNotBeanClasses() { return notBeanClasses; }
5258
5259   /**
5260    * Time zone.
5261    *
5262    * @return The time zone.
5263    */
5264   protected final TimeZone getTimeZone() { return timeZone; }
5265
5266   /**
5267    * Duration wire format.
5268    *
5269    * @return The duration wire format.
5270    */
5271   public final DurationFormat getDurationFormat() { return durationFormat; }
5272
5273   /**
5274    * Period wire format.
5275    *
5276    * @return The period wire format.
5277    */
5278   public final PeriodFormat getPeriodFormat() { return periodFormat; }
5279
5280   /**
5281    * Calendar wire format.
5282    *
5283    * @return The calendar wire format.
5284    */
5285   public final CalendarFormat getCalendarFormat() { return calendarFormat; }
5286
5287   /**
5288    * Date wire format.
5289    *
5290    * @return The date wire format.
5291    */
5292   public final DateFormat getDateFormat() { return dateFormat; }
5293
5294   /**
5295    * Temporal wire format.
5296    *
5297    * @return The temporal wire format.
5298    */
5299   public final TemporalFormat getTemporalFormat() { return temporalFormat; }
5300
5301   /**
5302    * Time-zone wire format.
5303    *
5304    * @return The time-zone wire format.
5305    */
5306   public final TimeZoneFormat getTimeZoneFormat() { return timeZoneFormat; }
5307
5308   /**
5309    * Locale wire format.
5310    *
5311    * @return The locale wire format.
5312    */
5313   public final LocaleFormat getLocaleFormat() { return localeFormat; }
5314
5315   /**
5316    * Binary wire format.
5317    *
5318    * @return The binary wire format.
5319    */
5320   public final BinaryFormat getBinaryFormat() { return binaryFormat; }
5321
5322   /**
5323    * Enum wire format.
5324    *
5325    * @return The enum wire format.
5326    */
5327   public final EnumFormat getEnumFormat() { return enumFormat; }
5328
5329   /**
5330    * UUID wire format.
5331    *
5332    * @return The UUID wire format.
5333    */
5334   public final UuidFormat getUuidFormat() { return uuidFormat; }
5335
5336   /**
5337    * BitSet wire format.
5338    *
5339    * @return The BitSet wire format.
5340    */
5341   public final BitSetFormat getBitSetFormat() { return bitSetFormat; }
5342
5343   /**
5344    * Big-number wire format.
5345    *
5346    * @return The big-number wire format.
5347    */
5348   public final BigNumberFormat getBigNumberFormat() { return bigNumberFormat; }
5349
5350   /**
5351    * Boolean wire format.
5352    *
5353    * @return The boolean wire format.
5354    */
5355   public final BooleanFormat getBooleanFormat() { return booleanFormat; }
5356
5357   /**
5358    * Float / Double non-finite wire format.
5359    *
5360    * @return The float wire format.
5361    */
5362   public final FloatFormat getFloatFormat() { return floatFormat; }
5363
5364   /**
5365    * Currency wire format.
5366    *
5367    * @return The currency wire format.
5368    */
5369   public final CurrencyFormat getCurrencyFormat() { return currencyFormat; }
5370
5371   /**
5372    * Class wire format.
5373    *
5374    * @return The class wire format.
5375    */
5376   public final ClassFormat getClassFormat() { return classFormat; }
5377
5378   /**
5379    * Session classloader.
5380    *
5381    * <p>
5382    * Returns the classloader explicitly configured via {@link Builder#classLoader(ClassLoader)}, or
5383    * <jk>null</jk> if none was set (callers should fall back to the thread-context classloader).
5384    *
5385    * @return The session classloader, or <jk>null</jk> if not set.
5386    */
5387   public final ClassLoader getClassLoader() { return classLoader; }
5388
5389   /**
5390    * Ignore transient fields.
5391    *
5392    * @see MarshallingContext.Builder#disableIgnoreTransientFields()
5393    * @return
5394    *    <jk>true</jk> if fields and methods marked as transient should not be ignored.
5395    */
5396   protected final boolean isIgnoreTransientFields() { return ignoreTransientFields; }
5397
5398   /**
5399    * Determines whether the specified class is ignored as a bean class based on the various exclusion parameters
5400    * specified on this context class.
5401    *
5402    * @param ci The class info being tested.
5403    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the specified class matches any of the exclusion parameters.
5404    */
5405   @SuppressWarnings({
5406      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for bean exclusion rule checking
5407   })
5408   protected final boolean isNotABean(ClassInfo ci) {
5409      if (ci.isArray() || ci.isPrimitive() || ci.isEnum() || ci.isAnnotation())
5410         return true;
5411      var p = ci.getPackage();
5412      if (nn(p)) {
5413         var pn = p.getName();
5414         for (var p2 : notBeanPackageNames)
5415            if (pn.equals(p2))
5416               return true;
5417         for (var p2 : notBeanPackagePrefixes)
5418            if (pn.startsWith(p2))
5419               return true;
5420      }
5421      for (var exclude : notBeanClasses)
5422         if (ci.isAssignableTo(exclude))
5423            return true;
5424      return false;
5425   }
5426
5427   /**
5428    * Returns a reusable {@link ClassMeta} representation for the class <c>Object</c>.
5429    *
5430    * <p>
5431    * This <c>ClassMeta</c> is often used to represent "any object type" when an object type is not known.
5432    *
5433    * <p>
5434    * This method is identical to calling <code>getClassMeta(Object.<jk>class</jk>)</code> but uses a cached copy to
5435    * avoid a hashmap lookup.
5436    *
5437    * @return The {@link ClassMeta} object associated with the <c>Object</c> class.
5438    */
5439   protected final ClassMeta<Object> object() {
5440      return cmObject;
5441   }
5442
5443   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
5444   // BeanTypeResolver implementation — bridges the marshalling-side ClassMeta resolution into the bean-modeling
5445   // SPI seam that BeanPropertyMeta.Builder.validate() consumes.
5446   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
5447
5448   @Override /* Overridden from BeanTypeResolver */
5449   public org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.BeanInfo<?> resolveType(AnnotationInfo<BeanProp> lastBeanProp, ClassInfo type, TypeVariables typeVarImpls) {
5450      return resolveClassMeta(lastBeanProp, type, typeVarImpls);
5451   }
5452
5453   @Override /* Overridden from BeanTypeResolver */
5454   public org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.BeanInfo<?> objectType() {
5455      return cmObject;
5456   }
5457
5458   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
5459   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
5460      return super.properties()
5461         .a(PROP_beanClassVisibility, beanClassVisibility)
5462         .a(PROP_beanConstructorVisibility, beanConstructorVisibility)
5463         .a(PROP_beanDictionary, beanDictionary)
5464         .a(PROP_beanFieldVisibility, beanFieldVisibility)
5465         .a(PROP_beanMethodVisibility, beanMethodVisibility)
5466         .a(PROP_beansRequireDefaultConstructor, beansRequireDefaultConstructor)
5467         .a(PROP_beansRequireSerializable, beansRequireSerializable)
5468         .a(PROP_beansRequireSettersForGetters, beansRequireSettersForGetters)
5469         .a(PROP_beansRequireSomeProperties, beansRequireSomeProperties)
5470         .a(PROP_id, System.identityHashCode(this))
5471         .a(PROP_ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters, ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnGetters)
5472         .a(PROP_ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters, ignoreInvocationExceptionsOnSetters)
5473         .a(PROP_ignoreTransientFields, ignoreTransientFields)
5474         .a(PROP_ignoreUnknownBeanProperties, ignoreUnknownBeanProperties)
5475         .a(PROP_ignoreUnknownNullBeanProperties, ignoreUnknownNullBeanProperties)
5476         .a(PROP_notBeanClasses, notBeanClasses)
5477         .a(PROP_notBeanPackageNames, notBeanPackageNames)
5478         .a(PROP_notBeanPackagePrefixes, notBeanPackagePrefixes)
5479         .a(PROP_unsortedProperties, unsortedProperties)
5480         .a(PROP_swaps, swaps)
5481         .a(PROP_durationFormat, durationFormat)
5482         .a(PROP_periodFormat, periodFormat)
5483         .a(PROP_calendarFormat, calendarFormat)
5484         .a(PROP_dateFormat, dateFormat)
5485         .a(PROP_temporalFormat, temporalFormat)
5486         .a(PROP_timeZoneFormat, timeZoneFormat)
5487         .a(PROP_localeFormat, localeFormat)
5488         .a(PROP_binaryFormat, binaryFormat)
5489         .a(PROP_enumFormat, enumFormat)
5490         .a(PROP_uuidFormat, uuidFormat)
5491         .a(PROP_bitSetFormat, bitSetFormat)
5492         .a(PROP_bigNumberFormat, bigNumberFormat)
5493         .a(PROP_booleanFormat, booleanFormat)
5494         .a(PROP_floatFormat, floatFormat)
5495         .a(PROP_currencyFormat, currencyFormat)
5496         .a(PROP_classFormat, classFormat)
5497         .a(PROP_classLoader, classLoader)
5498         .a(PROP_useInterfaceProxies, useInterfaceProxies)
5499         .a(PROP_useJavaBeanIntrospector, useJavaBeanIntrospector)
5500         .a(PROP_validateSchema, validateSchema);
5501   }
5502
5503   /**
5504    * Used for determining the class type on a method or field where a {@code @BeanProp} annotation may be present.
5505    *
5506    * @param <T> The class type we're wrapping.
5507    * @param p The property annotation info on the type if there is one.
5508    * @param ci The class info for the type.
5509    * @param typeVarImpls
5510    *    Contains known resolved type parameters on the specified class so that we can result
5511    *    {@code ParameterizedTypes} and {@code TypeVariables}.
5512    *    Can be <jk>null</jk> if the information is not known.
5513    * @return The new {@code ClassMeta} object wrapped around the type.
5514    */
5515   @SuppressWarnings({
5516      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for ClassMeta resolution with property annotations
5517   })
5518   protected final <T> ClassMeta<T> resolveClassMeta(AnnotationInfo<BeanProp> p, ClassInfo ci, TypeVariables typeVarImpls) {
5519      var cm = resolveClassMeta(ci, typeVarImpls);
5520      var cm2 = cm;
5521
5522      if (nn(p)) {
5523         var beanp = p.inner();
5524
5525         if (isNotVoid(beanp.type()))
5526            cm2 = resolveClassMeta(beanp.type(), typeVarImpls);
5527
5528         if (cm2.isMap()) {
5529            var pParams = (beanp.params().length == 0 ? a(Object.class, Object.class) : beanp.params());
5530            if (pParams.length != 2)
5531               throw rex("Invalid number of parameters specified for Map (must be 2): {0}", pParams.length);
5532            var keyType = resolveType(pParams[0], cm2.getKeyType(), cm.getKeyType());
5533            var valueType = resolveType(pParams[1], cm2.getValueType(), cm.getValueType());
5534            if (keyType.isObject() && valueType.isObject())
5535               return cm2;
5536            return new ClassMeta<>(cm2, keyType, valueType, null);
5537         }
5538
5539         if (cm2.isCollection() || cm2.isOptional()) {
5540            var pParams = (beanp.params().length == 0 ? a(Object.class) : beanp.params());
5541            if (pParams.length != 1) {
5542               String typeName;
5543               if (cm2.isCollection()) {
5544                  typeName = "Collection";
5545               } else if (cm2.isOptional()) {
5546                  typeName = "Optional";
5547               } else {
5548                  typeName = "Array";
5549               }
5550               throw rex("Invalid number of parameters specified for {1} (must be 1): {0}", pParams.length, typeName);
5551            }
5552            var elementType = resolveType(pParams[0], cm2.getElementType(), cm.getElementType());
5553            if (elementType.isObject())
5554               return cm2;
5555            return new ClassMeta<>(cm2, null, null, elementType);
5556         }
5557
5558         // Handle @BeanProp(elementType=) for BeanSupplier, BeanConsumer, BeanChannel, and Stream properties.
5559         if (isNotVoid(beanp.elementType()) && (cm2.isIterable() || cm2.isStream())) {
5560            var elementType = resolveClassMeta(beanp.elementType(), typeVarImpls);
5561            if (! elementType.isObject())
5562               return new ClassMeta<>(cm2, null, null, elementType);
5563         }
5564
5565         return cm2;
5566      }
5567
5568      return cm;
5569   }
5570
5571   /**
5572    * Returns a reusable {@link ClassMeta} representation for the class <c>String</c>.
5573    *
5574    * <p>
5575    * This <c>ClassMeta</c> is often used to represent key types in maps.
5576    *
5577    * <p>
5578    * This method is identical to calling <code>getClassMeta(String.<jk>class</jk>)</code> but uses a cached copy to
5579    * avoid a hashmap lookup.
5580    *
5581    * @return The {@link ClassMeta} object associated with the <c>String</c> class.
5582    */
5583   protected final ClassMeta<String> string() {
5584      return cmString;
5585   }
5586
5587   /**
5588    * Finds the type parameters for a parameterized type.
5589    *
5590    * @param o The generic type.
5591    * @param c The raw class.
5592    * @return The array of {@link ClassMeta} for each type parameter, or an empty array if parameters cannot be resolved.
5593    */
5594   @SuppressWarnings({
5595      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for type parameter resolution
5596   })
5597   final ClassMeta[] findParameters(Type o, Class c) {
5598      if (o == null)
5599         o = c;
5600
5601      // Loop until we find a ParameterizedType
5602      if (! (o instanceof ParameterizedType)) {
5603         while (nn(c)) {
5604            o = c.getGenericSuperclass();
5605            if (!(o instanceof ParameterizedType))
5606               o = Arrays.stream(c.getGenericInterfaces()).filter(t -> t instanceof ParameterizedType).findFirst().orElse(null);
5607            if (o instanceof ParameterizedType)
5608               break;
5609            c = c.getSuperclass();
5610         }
5611      }
5612
5613      if (o instanceof ParameterizedType o2 && ! o2.getRawType().equals(Enum.class)) {
5614         var l = new LinkedList<ClassMeta<?>>();
5615         for (var pt2 : o2.getActualTypeArguments()) {
5616            if (pt2 instanceof WildcardType || pt2 instanceof TypeVariable)
5617               return new ClassMeta[0];
5618            l.add(resolveClassMeta(pt2, null));
5619         }
5620         if (l.isEmpty())
5621            return new ClassMeta[0];
5622         return l.toArray(new ClassMeta[l.size()]);
5623      }
5624
5625      return new ClassMeta[0];
5626   }
5627
5628   @SuppressWarnings({
5629      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for ClassMeta resolution with type variables
5630   })
5631   final ClassMeta resolveClassMeta(Type o, TypeVariables typeVars) {
5632      if (o == null)
5633         return null;
5634
5635      if (o instanceof ClassMeta<?> cm) {
5636
5637         // This classmeta could have been created by a different context.
5638         // Need to re-resolve it to pick up ObjectSwaps and stuff on this context.
5639         if (cm.getMarshallingContext() == this)
5640            return cm;
5641         if (cm.isMap())
5642            return getClassMeta(cm.inner(), cm.getKeyType(), cm.getValueType());
5643         if (cm.isCollection() || cm.isOptional())
5644            return getClassMeta(cm.inner(), cm.getElementType());
5645         return getClassMeta(cm.inner());
5646      }
5647
5648      // Handle ClassInfo by extracting the underlying Type
5649      if (o instanceof ClassInfo o2) {
5650         return resolveClassMeta(o2.innerType(), typeVars);
5651      }
5652
5653      var c = TypeVariables.resolve(o, typeVars);
5654
5655      // This can happen when trying to resolve the "E getFirst()" method on LinkedList, whose type is a TypeVariable
5656      // These should just resolve to Object.
5657      if (c == null)
5658         return object();
5659
5660      var rawType = getClassMeta(c);
5661
5662      // If this is a Map or Collection, and the parameter types aren't part
5663      // of the class definition itself (e.g. class AddressBook extends List<Person>),
5664      // then we need to figure out the parameters.
5665      if (rawType.isMap() || rawType.isCollection() || rawType.isOptional()) {
5666         var params = findParameters(o, c);
5667         if (params.length == 0)
5668            return rawType;
5669         if (rawType.isMap()) {
5670            if (params.length != 2 || (params[0].isObject() && params[1].isObject()))
5671               return rawType;
5672            return new ClassMeta(rawType, params[0], params[1], null);
5673         }
5674         if (rawType.isCollection() || rawType.isOptional()) {
5675            if (params.length != 1 || params[0].isObject())
5676               return rawType;
5677            return new ClassMeta(rawType, null, null, params[0]);
5678         }
5679      }
5680
5681      if (rawType.isArray() && o instanceof GenericArrayType o2) {
5682         var elementType = resolveClassMeta(o2.getGenericComponentType(), typeVars);
5683         return new ClassMeta(rawType, null, null, elementType);
5684      }
5685
5686      return rawType;
5687   }
5688
5689   /*
5690    * Resolves the 'genericized' class meta at the specified position in the ClassMeta array.
5691    */
5692   private ClassMeta<?> getTypedClassMeta(ClassMeta<?>[] c, int pos) {
5693      var cm = c[pos++];
5694      if (cm.isCollection() || cm.isOptional()) {
5695         var ce = c.length == pos ? object() : getTypedClassMeta(c, pos);
5696         return (ce.isObject() ? cm : new ClassMeta(cm, null, null, ce));
5697      } else if (cm.isMap()) {
5698         var ck = c.length == pos ? object() : c[pos++];
5699         var cv = c.length == pos ? object() : getTypedClassMeta(c, pos);
5700         return (ck.isObject() && cv.isObject() ? cm : new ClassMeta(cm, ck, cv, null));
5701      }
5702      return cm;
5703   }
5704
5705
5706   private ClassMeta<?> resolveType(Type...t) {
5707      for (var tt : t) {
5708         if (nn(tt)) {
5709            var cm = getClassMeta(tt);
5710            if (tt != cmObject)
5711               return cm;
5712         }
5713      }
5714      return cmObject;
5715   }
5716}
